title: Automate your workflow with GitHub Actions Part 1 of 2
summary: Learn how GitHub Actions enables you to automate your software development cycle.

sections.title: Automate your workflow with GitHub Actions Part 1 of 2
sections.summary: Learn how GitHub Actions enables you to automate your software development cycle.

lessons.title: Automate development tasks by using GitHub Actions
lessons.content_md:
Create a basic GitHub Action and use that action in a workflow.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/github-actions-automate-tasks/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Automate development tasks by using GitHub Actions

lessons.title: Build continuous integration workflows by using GitHub Actions
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to create workflows to add continuous integration (CI) to your projects.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/github-actions-ci/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Build continuous integration workflows by using GitHub Actions

lessons.title: Build and deploy applications to Azure by using GitHub Actions
lessons.content_md:
Create two deployment workflows using GitHub Actions and Microsoft Azure. Learn about triggering a CD workflow and storing credentials.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/github-actions-cd/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Build and deploy applications to Azure by using GitHub Actions

lessons.title: Automate GitHub by using GitHub Script
lessons.content_md:
Learn to interact with the GitHub API from GitHub Actions by using GitHub Script.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/automate-github-using-github-script/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Automate GitHub by using GitHub Script

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Automate your workflow with GitHub Actions Part 1 of 2
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Automate your workflow with GitHub Actions Part 1 of 2**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
